titleStmt.title: SII 31.219: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 219. (A.R. No. B 227 of 1936.) MALLEVĀGU, VINUKONDA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab, Survey No. 675/3 in Lālipuram (hamlet) of the village Mallevāgu.

It is dated in Śaka (wrong for Kali) 4883, Bhāva, Jyēshṭha śu. 15, Sunday. This may be assigned to the 17th century on the palaeography. The details of the date regularly correspond to 1634 A.D., June 1.
It registers the gift of wet land of 1 kuchchala in extent situated in Malagumtala to Sāvāju Rāmābattuḍu by Verlamti Peddaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayā
bhyudaya śālivāhana śaka
varuṣaṁbulu nāluguvēluṁnu Eṁnūṭa ya
nubhaimūṁḍu Agunēṁṭi bhāva saṁvvatsara jēṣṭha śu 15 Ā .
verlaṁṭi peddayaṁgāru sāvōju rāmābattuniki
yiccina dharmaśāsanaṁ . māku sāgivoccimalagu
ṁtalā rājagoṁgumāni cēnustalaṁ kucculani ku
māṁsyamustimi ganaka Āṁduvalaṁyuru .
ṁgga kuccalacēnu nīvu bōkkamuṁtala pāṭi pōlaṁlōsu nuI tavvi
ṁcisaṁduku Istimi ganaka mīputrapautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu A
subhaviṁccibratikēdi . Ācēnistaḷaṁ tū¨rpuku cuṁcula ma
ḍlunuṁḍi vaccina vāṁgumēragānunna dakṣiṇānaku bōkka
muṁtalapāṭi polimēragānunna paḍimaṭiki nāgā¨rjunu
mulōṁgānu Istimi ganaka yī cēnu
niṁgāni gaṁgaka¨rtagōvu
ḍu maṁgala mahaśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.219 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
